review_text: Worst purchase of my life. The KitchenMaster Pro arrived with a cracked lid. Customer service made me wait 3 weeks for a replacement that never came. It leaks constantly, the motor is loud as a lawnmower, and the blades rusted after 2 washes. Do NOT buy.

scoring_notes.notes: pros MUST be empty; urgency MUST be high (angry, damaged product)
